reply_text:
The reason they are in the games is debt, so it means survival of the fittest. The Reason player 456 comeback is to Stop the game and Save MORE lives. But he fails instead the show focused on player 222, feels like watching a different show no offense. I watched and wait for the season 3 because of the Games and how they could finished it. There are so many unnecessary deaths because of player 222. 

The Mom and Son duo. She stabbed her son just to protect player 222, and the other day she end herself because of the guilt of stabbing her son. Then player 222 proceed to end her life because she can’t continue the game. They could do player 222 let the son stabbed her because of her swollen or broken ankle. She did not know the next game. We all know that grandma would take care of the baby.

The Shaman’s death was boring, i was expecting a revenge from her to player 100 maybe in the final game. They could had from the final game Grandma and Son, player 456,Shaman, Player 333, player 100, player 125, player 222 the baby, and one random player. We could watched how this close friend’s characters would do. But no they put so many random characters at the end🙈. The front man could just take the baby disqualify it by not executing it. So the focus was on the games and challenges not just the baby and Guard 11 become a super soldier with unlimited ammo. 

But kudos for player 456 sacrificing himself and leaving his own daughter.

Thank you for having the same understanding. This is exactly what I thought of, the plot is great and it is highly philosophical, it’s not about solving the problem, but making us viewer to think about humanity itself. If more people are like Gi-hun, the less the VIP and those with authority can exploit us and bet us like horses.

There’s many more philosophical implications in the show. The baby represented a life who has no ability to make decision being forced to live or die by the environment and people around her. Having the baby win also in some way represents the humanity itself is still winning and there’s still hope.
